title: VALUES multiple inserts error
poc: insert into multiples VALUES((select count(*) from data)), ((select count(distinct i) from data));
insert into multiples VALUES((select count(*) from data));
insert into multiples VALUES((select count(distinct i) from data));
key_bug_features: INSERT with SELECT from multiple rows causes error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data(id INTEGER, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_multiples(count_all INTEGER, count_distinct INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_multiples SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM test_data;
INSERT INTO test_multiples VALUES((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM test_data));
